_doc: Weight manifest (R160). The single list of 'what the app expects on disk and where to get it'. Weights NEVER live in git; bulk weights sit in the parent monorepo's src/village_ai/models/ (outside this repo). Entry types: 'hf_diffusers' = pulled via diffusers from_pretrained into the HF hub cache; 'file' = a single weight fetched from the companion HF repo, checksum-verified. Presence-check -> offer fetch -> fail only if that fails (R163). Only models needed by the ACTIVE phase are fetched.
_companion_repo_status: PLACEHOLDER — companion HF repo not yet created. Update URL on creation; 'file' entry urls below resolve against it.

essential_for: P0 smoke target — zimage t2i batch (§12)
models.note: Public, Apache-2.0 diffusers repo pulled by stage1_load_pipeline.from_pretrained; integrity via hub etags. NOT mirrored in the companion repo.

essential_for: Muse generative SLM/VLM — all generative roles (R144)
